title: cassinia straminea
intro: Cassinia straminea, also known as woolly cassinia, is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Cassinia straminea include relief from fever, colds, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Cassinia straminea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal benefits, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
